revision.text:
'''Shikobuchi Jinja''' (思子淵神社) refers to multiple {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} located in the {{ill|Azumi River|ja|安曇川}} basin, including [[Shiga Prefecture]]'s {{ill|Takashima City|ja|高島市}} and {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}.
* {{ill|Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Azumi-gawa Town, Nakano)|ja|思子淵神社 (高島市安曇川町中野)}} - Located in Azumi-gawa Town. * {{ill|Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Kutsuki Ogawa)|ja|思子淵神社 (高島市朽木小川)}} - Located in Kutsuki Ogawa. * {{ill|Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Kutsuki Taira)|ja|思子淵神社 (高島市朽木平良)}} - Located in Kutsuki Taira. * {{ill|Shikobuchi Shrine (Kyoto City, Sakyo-ku, Kuta)|ja|思古渕社}} - Located in Kuta, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Seven Shikobuchi|ja|七シコブチ}}
{{Ambiguity}}

6 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:思子淵神社 up to rev 101902228
revision.text:
'''思子淵神社'''（しこぶちじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]、[[京都市]]など[[安曇川]]流域に鎮座する[[神社]]。複数社存在する。
* [[思子淵神社 (高島市安曇川町中野)]] - 安曇川町に鎮座。 * [[思子淵神社 (高島市朽木小川)]] - 朽木小川に鎮座。 * [[思子淵神社 (高島市朽木平良)]] - 朽木平良に鎮座。 * [[思古渕社]] - 京都市左京区久多に鎮座。
== 関連項目 == * [[七シコブチ]]
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:しこふちしんしや}} [[Category:神社 (祭神・信仰別)]] [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[思子淵神社]] to [[Shikobuchi Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

* [[思子淵神社 (高島市安曇川町中野)]] - 安曇川町に鎮座。 * [[思子淵神社 (高島市朽木小川)]] - 朽木小川に鎮座。 * [[思子淵神社 (高島市朽木平良)]] - 朽木平良に鎮座。 * [[思古渕社]] - 京都市左京区久多に鎮座。

Text replacement - "Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Azumi-gawa Town, Nakano)" to "Shikobuchi Shrine (Takashima City)"
Removing from [[Category:Pages with former wikipedia userpage links]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "pages without english wikidata name" to "qq"

* {{ill|Shikobuchi Shrine (Takashima City)|ja|思子淵神社 (高島市安曇川町中野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikobuchi Shrine (Takashima City)|qq=}} - Located in Azumi-gawa Town. * {{ill|Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Kutsuki Ogawa)|ja|思子淵神社 (高島市朽木小川)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Kutsuki Ogawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kutsuki Ogawa. * {{ill|Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Kutsuki Taira)|ja|思子淵神社 (高島市朽木平良)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikobuchi Jinja (Takashima City, Kutsuki Taira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kutsuki Taira. * {{ill|Shikobuchi Shrine (Kyoto City, Sakyo-ku, Kuta)|ja|思古渕社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikobuchi Shrine (Kyoto City, Sakyo-ku, Kuta)|qq=}} - Located in Kuta, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto.
